service.stopTips: Stop the challenge environment service. This command can stop the environment services of other topics here.
service.restartTips: Restart the challenge environment service, use this when you accidentally damage the challenge environment.
service.delayTips: Extend the duration of the challenge environment. The default service time after the challenge environment starts is one hour. If you feel that this time is insufficient, you can use this command to extend it.
service.noEnv: This challenge does not provide an online environment.
service.error: Failed to obtain the challenge environment configuration.
service.onlyOneInstancePersist: Only one challenge service can be activated at the same time.
service.onlyOneInstancePersistChoice: Do you want to stop other challenge services and start the current challenge?

clear.man: Clear the terminal output and start over.

echo.man: Output any input as it is.

shell.helpCommands: You have the following commands available:
shell.helpTips: Enter the formatted {{flag}} directly in this terminal to submit. You can enter {{help}} to get more usage help.

code.title: Temporary User Identification Code
code.warn: This verification code is used to provide your complete account information, including your email and organization certification information, to third-party services. The competition organizers may use this verification code to confirm your identity. Do not provide this verification code randomly for unknown purposes!
code.verify: This feature is only available after you have verified your email.

account.deleteAccountTips1: Please be clear that your account has not been truly deleted, but has been deactivated and cannot be restored. The following actions will be taken:
account.deleteAccountTips2: Please read the above content carefully and confirm it! If you are really sure you want to deactivate your account, please enter your full username {{name}} below to confirm:
account.deleteAccountTips3: Please note that due to the deletion of privacy information related to identity verification, even if you contact the management/operations staff, it will not be possible to restore a deactivated account. Please think carefully before proceeding.
account.deleteAccountTipsList1: Your account will be renamed to [DELETED]_<hash>;
account.deleteAccountTipsList2: Your account will have all permissions removed and be banned from logging in, and it cannot be recovered through email. The email can be used to register another account;
account.deleteAccountTipsList3: Account privacy information will be removed, but publicly posted content will remain.
account.deleteAccountTipsList4: Competition results and data associated with the account will be retained, but information cannot be provided to prove that it is yours.
account.deleteAccountTipsTitle1: Please be clear that your account has not actually been deleted, but has been placed in a state of deletion and cannot be restored. The following actions will be taken:
